entries.summary_quote: The PSC also has a concern over the long-term rate implications of any expenditures to be made by NYSE&G and NMPC for electric system expansion and upgrading necessitated by the games. There are disturbing statements in the EIS which imply the possibility of shortfalls in revenues to be derived from Olympic events whereby local ratepayers might have to bear the economic burden by substantially increased rates in the post-Olympic period. To preclude such a possibility plans should be conceived to assure an equitable distribution of Olympic-related utility costs.
